message:
Rename session-memory to decision-log with clearer terminology

Investigation → Problem, Attempt → Approach. Tool names updated:
start_investigation → open_problem, log_attempt → log_approach,
resolve_investigation → close_problem, get_session_context → get_context,
list_investigations → list_problems. Storage path now ~/.claude/decision-log/.
Tool descriptions rewritten to emphasize logging every approach.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 {
-  "name": "session-memory",
+  "name": "decision-log",
   "version": "0.1.0",
-  "description": "Structured session memory — logs decisions and investigations to survive context compaction",
+  "description": "Logs decisions and problem-solving approaches to survive context compaction",
   "author": {
     "name": "Prime Radiant",
     "email": "eng@primeradiant.ai"
